top_patterns.description: Open with a brief activity or event, often mentioning location or participants.
example_quotes: Hanging with a leopard at Branson's safari lodge. Amazing.
Leading the first tee open at @pebblebeach with my #dad

top_patterns.description: Share a personal thought, mood, or reflection, often with a casual tone.
example_quotes: I think today could be the halfway mark... 🏁 #birthday
California dreaming.

top_patterns.description: Encourage participation, donations, or joining a cause.
example_quotes: Everyone join me in this commitment today!!!
Help me raise $20,000 for charity: water - every dollar helps!

top_patterns.description: Mention the content or editing process, often with a casual tone.
example_quotes: Shot this in Venice and edited with piclab. Love this app
Everyone join me in this commitment today!!!

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Share a moment or experience with a personal touch.
example_quotes: Hanging with a leopard at Branson's safari lodge. Amazing.
Leading the first tee open at @pebblebeach with my #dad

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Engage followers in a cause or activity.
example_quotes: Everyone join me in this commitment today!!!
Help me raise $20,000 for charity: water - every dollar helps!

archetypal_structures.emotional_job: Express mood or reflection tied to a moment.
example_quotes: I think today could be the halfway mark... 🏁 #birthday
California dreaming.

closers: every penny of the money raised
language_habits.sentence_length_profile: mostly short, punchy sentences, often 5-15 words
language_habits.line_break_style: mostly continuous, minimal line breaks, occasional use of hashtags or emojis

example_quotes: Liam. Bamm. Where's my coffee
Nice @shinloa article in esquire. Wearing mine :)

voice_tells.why_it_matters: Connects to broader conversations and communities
example_quotes: Ha! #regram #TOMSshoes
at #CGI2013
Last week I visited the future site of the Haiti factory...
It's finally getting weird @humanpoweredproductcustomizer

anti_patterns: Too many calls to action in one caption
Lack of personal voice or anecdote

synthesis_notes.what_this_batch_says_about_current_voice: Blake's current Instagram voice is casual, engaging, and action-oriented, emphasizing personal moments and causes.
synthesis_notes.what_changed_vs_older_voice: Shift from more formal or generic captions to more personal, story-driven, and community-focused posts.
